assistants.label: BA Research Agent
assistants.description: Researches and analyzes Jira stories to create comprehensive BA specifications and requirement documents. Reviews pre-development requirements for completeness, consistency, and scope correctness.
exampleQuestions: Analyze requirements for MMRU-1234 and create a BA specification
Review the pre-development requirements for story MMRU-5678 for completeness
Create a BA spec document for the user story about payment processing

assistants.label: Chat Agent
assistants.description: Fast data analyst for ad-hoc business questions backed by ClickHouse analytics. Supports charts, data visualization, and quick data insights.
exampleQuestions: Show me the top 10 clients by loan volume this month
What is the approval rate trend over the last 6 months?
Create a chart of daily active users for the past 30 days

assistants.label: MT Chat Agent
assistants.description: Fast knowledge retriever for quick factual lookups and Q&A from your knowledge base.
exampleQuestions: What is the process for loan application approval?
Find documentation about the credit scoring algorithm
What are the current KYC requirements?

assistants.label: Pure Local Chat Agent
assistants.description: Local-only chat with no external data retrieval. Use for privacy-sensitive conversations or offline reasoning without any knowledge base access.

assistants.label: SD Chat Agent
assistants.description: Jira Service Management assistant for triaging, classifying, and responding to service desk tickets. Helps structure and route support requests efficiently.
exampleQuestions: Create a service desk ticket for a VPN access request
Triage this incident: production database is returning errors
Help me draft a response to a billing complaint ticket

assistants.label: Story Chat Agent
assistants.description: Business Analysis Assistant for creating high-quality Jira user stories. Transforms stakeholder requirements into well-structured stories with acceptance criteria.
exampleQuestions: Create a user story for adding two-factor authentication to the login flow
Write a story for the feature: users can export their transaction history as CSV
Turn this requirement into a Jira story: marketing needs a referral tracking dashboard

assistants.label: QA Research Agent
assistants.description: Generates complete QA packages from Jira tickets: requirements analysis, gap detection, functional checklists, manual test cases, and effort estimation.
exampleQuestions: Generate a full QA package for MMRU-1234
Create test cases for the password reset flow in MMRU-5678
Estimate QA effort and identify requirement gaps for story MMRU-9012

assistants.label: Codebase Q&A Agent (for business users)
assistants.description: Business-facing Q&A assistant for your GitLab codebase. Helps non-developers understand what features, integrations, and functionality exist in the code.
exampleQuestions: Does our system support batch loan disbursement?
What integrations do we have with external payment providers?
How does the automatic credit limit adjustment work in the code?

assistants.label: Spec Research Agent
assistants.description: Technical Business Analyst for investigating Jira issues, building retrieval evidence bundles, and producing normalized requirements corpora for development teams.
exampleQuestions: Investigate and build a requirements corpus for MMRU-1234
Retrieve all related specifications and evidence for story MMRU-5678
Produce a normalized requirements document for the authentication module

assistants.label: Meeting Summary Agent
assistants.description: Extracts key decisions, action items, and discussion points from meeting transcripts or notes. Produces structured summaries ready to share with stakeholders.
exampleQuestions: Summarize this meeting transcript and extract all action items
What decisions were made in this planning session? [paste transcript]
Create a stakeholder-ready summary of this sprint retrospective

assistants.label: MNA Doc Generator Agent
assistants.description: Generates M&A documentation packages from retrieved tool inputs. Produces structured acquisition and due diligence documents from provided data sources.
exampleQuestions: Generate an M&A due diligence package for target company XYZ
Create a term sheet document for the proposed acquisition
Produce a financial summary and risk assessment for the deal

assistants.label: Legal Document Assistant Agent
assistants.description: Drafts, reviews, and answers questions about legal documents and contracts. Helps identify key clauses, risks, and obligations in legal texts.
exampleQuestions: Review this NDA and highlight any unusual or risky clauses
Draft a standard software services agreement for a B2B client
What are the key obligations and termination conditions in this contract?
